office_does: County commissioners adopt budgets, set policy, and oversee departments, infrastructure, and services.
race_blurb: Four candidates present business, nonprofit, housing, civic, inspection, and emergency-management backgrounds.

candidates.summary: Scalf is a former chamber executive with nonprofit, business, restoration, and extension experience emphasizing prudent budgets and broad public investment.
highlights: Emphasizes prudent budgeting, housing, infrastructure, health care, transportation, and workforce investment [S1].

spending.basis: Her platform combines prudent budgeting with multiple public-investment priorities.

experience.basis: She has substantial civic and management experience but no documented elected county record.

candidates.summary: Hannon manages housing resources and emphasizes affordable housing, infrastructure, services, responsible growth, and working families.
highlights: Has direct housing-services and coordinated-entry experience [S1].

housing.basis: His stated housing focus is affordable housing and service coordination rather than market deregulation.

spending.basis: He emphasizes infrastructure and public services as primary tools.

experience.basis: He has relevant service-management experience but no documented elected record.

candidates.summary: Ball is a business owner and civic leader emphasizing fiscal stewardship, roads, safety, services, development, and environmental protection.
highlights: Emphasizes fiscal stewardship, roads, safety, essential services, and environmental protection [S1].

spending.basis: Fiscal stewardship is an explicit priority.

experience.basis: Her civic-board and initiative record is substantial but not county incumbency.

candidates.summary: Nieman is a contractor, inspector, investigator, and emergency volunteer emphasizing oversight, measurable results, service efficiency, and permitting reform.
highlights: Calls for oversight, measurable results, efficiency or cuts, and permitting reform [S1].

spending.basis: He explicitly prioritizes oversight, measurable results, efficiency, and service cuts where warranted.

housing.basis: He proposes permitting reform to lower housing costs.

experience.basis: He brings private and volunteer experience without a documented elected record.
